mapper.select: select shipper_id,consignor,short_name from t_shipper where consignor = #{consignor} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}

select shipper_id,consignor from t_shipper where consignor = #{consignor} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and shipper_id not in
#{item}
select shipper_id, consignor, short_name, disable_flag, area, tax_point from t_shipper where enterprise_id= #{enterpriseId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} order by create_time desc
select co.*, e.actual_name as managerName from t_shipper co left join t_employee e on co.manager_id = e.employee_id where co.shipper_id = #{shipperId}
select shipper_id,consignor,disable_flag from t_shipper where shipper_id = #{shipperId}
mapper.update:
update t_shipper set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where shipper_id in
#{item}
update t_shipper set consignor = #{name} where shipper_id = #{shipperId}
update t_shipper set manager_id = #{managerId} where shipper_id = #{shipperId}
